text.title: Go Error Handling Patterns Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals from inputs to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml for go-error-handling-patterns.

decision-tree.root-question: Is the project Go 1.21+ AND has multi-layer call chains needing classification?

conclusion.verdict: SKIP — convention overhead exceeds payoff at this scale
skip — preconditions in Applies-If not met

text.example: Go 1.21 + 4 layers + idiomatic stdlib → first two branches do not match → wrapping correct → errors.Is/As only → no control-flow panics → single edge translator → all_gates_green=true → APPROVE.
